commands.summary: fabric-hub (forgewire monorepo) checks cleanly with the new forgelink module wired into the needs_approval dispatch path.
6 fabric-hub unit tests passed: config/opt-out/reconcile gating, kind->authority mapping, the agent-governance-v1 approval-request body, and decision classification.

environment.process_note: AGH-028 Fabric side, loop closed end to end: fabric-hub auto-routes held HITL approvals to ForgeLink's agent-governance-v1 contract when configured/reachable (FORGELINK_HITL opt-out, silent fallback), and GET /approvals/{id} reconciles a pending routed approval by polling ForgeLink's status (fabric-<approval_id>, needs FORGELINK_MCP_TOKEN) and resolving the Fabric approval approved/denied, audited as forgelink_decision_synced. Cross-repo; lands in the forgewire monorepo, mirrored to forgewire-fabric.
